name: Petrification Staff
why: One of the strongest control relics in the game. Its Petrify effect can completely disable key enemies, making it a top-tier choice for both PvP and PvE across all factions.
description: Casts Petrification Magic to damage enemies while inflicting Petrify, preventing affected targets from taking action. Its exceptional crowd control makes Petrification Staff one of the most valuable Legendary relics for any lineup.
